## Pull Request

### Type of Change
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] New research artifact
- [ ] Framework update
- [ ] Repository structure improvement
- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, formatting error)
- [ ] Other

### Description

Briefly describe the change and its purpose.

### Checklist

- [ ] This change aligns with the [Research Portfolio Handbook](docs/RESEARCH_PORTFOLIO_HANDBOOK.md)
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly (tested locally or via GitHub preview)
- [ ] Internal links are valid
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated if this is a significant change
- [ ] Document metadata (version, date, author) has been updated
- [ ] No unfinished placeholders remain unless explicitly marked `> *Forthcoming*`

### Related Issues

Closes #
